name: Maze Bank
desc: Maze Bank is the largest financial institution in San Andreas and the tallest skyscraper in Los Santos is their headquarters. Offering retail banking, private wealth management, and investment services, Maze Bank handles the accounts of everyone from Vinewood celebrities to Blaine County ranchers.

history.event: Founded as First National Bank of Los Santos by Victor Moorland Sr.
Renamed Maze Bank after merger with Continental Trust.
Maze Bank Tower construction completed — tallest building in LS.
Survived the financial crisis through emergency government loan of $2.1B.
Launched MazePay digital banking platform — 2M users in first year.
Record profit of $1.1B despite ongoing robbery incidents at branches.
